title: alisma gramineum var. geyeri
intro: Alisma gramineum var. geyeri, also known as Geyer's water plantain, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the Alismataceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geyer's water plantain include reducing edema, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Alisma gramineum var. geyeri can be found in various forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
